Latte tag: block.description: Latte tag: Defines a named block: {block name}...{/block}.

Latte tag: anonymous block.description: Latte tag: Creates an anonymous block, often used with block filters.

Latte tag: local block.description: Latte tag: Defines a local block: {block local name}...{/block}.

Latte include: sandbox.description: Latte tag: Renders an untrusted template in sandbox mode: {sandbox file}.

Latte tag: try.description: Latte tag: Starts a recoverable try block: {try}...{/try}.

Latte tag: rollback.description: Latte tag: Rolls back output inside a {try} block.

Latte tag: embed.description: Latte tag: Embeds a template and allows block overrides: {embed file}...{/embed}.

Nette snippet: snippet.description: Nette snippet: Defines an AJAX snippet block: {snippet name}...{/snippet}.

Nette snippet: snippetArea.description: Nette snippet: Defines a snippet wrapper area: {snippetArea name}...{/snippetArea}.

Latte include: import.description: Latte tag: Imports blocks from another template: {import file}.

Latte include: layout.description: Latte tag: Selects the layout template: {layout file}.

Latte include: extends.description: Latte tag: Extends another template: {extends file}.

Latte tag: capture.description: Latte tag: Captures rendered output into a variable: {capture $var}...{/capture}.

Latte tag: define.description: Latte tag: Defines a reusable block: {define name}...{/define}.

Latte include: template file.description: Latte tag: Includes another template file: {include file}.

Latte include: template with blocks.description: Latte tag: Includes a template and enables block inheritance: {include file with blocks}.

Latte include: named block.description: Latte tag: Includes a block by name: {include blockname}.

Latte include: block from template.description: Latte tag: Includes a block from another template: {include blockname from file}.

Latte flow: foreach.description: Latte flow: Loops over items: {foreach $items as $item}...{/foreach}.

Latte flow: while.description: Latte flow: Repeats while an expression is truthy: {while ...}...{/while}.

Latte flow: iterateWhile.description: Latte flow: Continues a structured foreach loop with {iterateWhile}.

Latte flow: for.description: Latte flow: Creates a counted loop: {for $i = 0; ...}...{/for}.

Latte flow: first.description: Latte flow: Renders content only on the first loop iteration: {first}...{/first}.

Latte flow: last.description: Latte flow: Renders content only on the last loop iteration: {last}...{/last}.

Latte flow: separator.description: Latte flow: Renders separator content between loop items: {sep}...{/sep}.

Latte flow: continueIf.description: Latte flow: Continues the loop when a condition is true: {continueIf $cond}.

Latte flow: skipIf.description: Latte flow: Skips rendering when a condition is true: {skipIf $cond}.

Latte flow: breakIf.description: Latte flow: Breaks the loop when a condition is true: {breakIf $cond}.

Latte flow: exitIf.description: Latte flow: Stops rendering when a condition is true: {exitIf $cond}.

Latte flow: switch.description: Latte flow: Creates a switch block with cases: {switch expr}...{/switch}.

Latte flow: case.description: Latte flow: Adds a switch case: {case value}.

Latte flow: default case.description: Latte flow: Adds the default switch branch: {default}.

Latte flow: elseif.description: Latte flow: Adds an alternate condition branch: {elseif $cond}.

Latte flow: else.description: Latte flow: Adds an alternate branch: {else}.

Latte flow: ifset.description: Latte flow: Renders when a value is set: {ifset $var}...{/ifset}.

Latte flow: ifset block.description: Latte flow: Renders when a block exists: {ifset blockname}...{/ifset}.

Latte flow: elseifset.description: Latte flow: Adds an alternate isset branch: {elseifset $var}.

Latte flow: ifchanged.description: Latte flow: Renders when an expression changes: {ifchanged expr}...{/ifchanged}.

Nette cache: cache.description: Nette tag: Caches rendered output: {cache key}...{/cache}.

Latte variable: default.description: Latte tag: Defines a default template variable: {default $name = value}.

Nette link: link.description: Nette tag: Creates a presenter link: {link Destination}.

Nette link: plink.description: Nette tag: Creates an absolute presenter link: {plink Destination}.

Nette link: linkBase.description: Nette tag: Changes the base used by generated links: {linkBase /}.

Nette component: control.description: Nette tag: Renders a component/control: {control name}.

Nette form: form.description: Nette form: Renders a form block: {form name}...{/form}.

Nette form: formContainer.description: Nette form: Renders a form container block: {formContainer name}...{/formContainer}.

Nette form: label.description: Nette form: Renders a form label: {label field /}.

Nette form: label pair.description: Nette form: Renders a custom label body: {label field}...{/label}.

Nette form: input.description: Nette form: Renders a form input: {input field}.

Nette form: inputError.description: Nette form: Prints the error message for a form control: {inputError field}.

Nette asset: asset.description: Nette asset: Renders an asset URL or element: {asset file}.

Nette asset: preload.description: Nette asset: Generates preload hints for an asset: {preload file}.

Latte type: varPrint.description: Latte type: Prints inferred template variables: {varPrint name}.

Latte variable: var.description: Latte tag: Declares a template variable: {var $name = value}.

Latte type: parameters.description: Latte type: Declares template parameters: {parameters type $name}.

Latte type: varType.description: Latte type: Annotates a variable type: {varType type $var}.

Latte type: templateType.description: Latte type: Annotates the template parameter class: {templateType Class}.

Latte type: templatePrint.description: Latte type: Generates template type information: {templatePrint Class}.

Latte tag: syntax.description: Latte tag: Switches Latte syntax mode: {syntax mode}...{/syntax}.

Latte tag: spaceless.description: Latte tag: Removes whitespace between HTML tags: {spaceless}...{/spaceless}.

Latte escape: left brace.description: Latte tag: Prints a literal opening brace with {l}.

Latte escape: right brace.description: Latte tag: Prints a literal closing brace with {r}.

Latte comment: block comment.description: Latte comment: Inserts a Latte block comment: {* comment *}.

Latte translator: message.description: Latte tag: Translates a message with {_'message'}.

Latte translator: message with context.description: Latte tag: Translates a message with context: {_'message', context}.

Latte translator: translate block.description: Latte tag: Translates the enclosed content: {translate}...{/translate}.

Latte expression: ternary.description: Latte expression: Inserts a ternary output expression: {$cond ? a : b}.

Latte output: contentType.description: Latte tag: Sets the output content type: {contentType application/xml}.

Latte expression: do.description: Latte tag: Executes an expression without output: {do expr}.

Latte debug: dump.description: Latte debug: Dumps a variable for debugging: {dump $var}.

Latte tag: php.description: Latte tag: Runs PHP-like code inside a Latte tag: {php code}.

Latte debug: debugbreak.description: Latte debug: Triggers a debugger break conditionally: {debugbreak $cond}.

Latte debug: trace.description: Latte debug: Displays the current template stack trace: {trace}.

Latte function: clamp.description: Latte function: Clamps a value to a range: clamp(value, min, max).

Latte function: divisibleBy.description: Latte function: Checks if a number is divisible by another: divisibleBy(value, by).

Latte function: even.description: Latte function: Checks if a number is even: even(value).

Latte function: first.description: Latte function: Returns the first item or character: first(value).

Latte function: group.description: Latte function: Groups items by a key or callback: group(items, by).

Latte function: hasBlock.description: Latte function: Checks whether a block exists: hasBlock(name).

Latte function: hasTemplate.description: Latte function: Checks whether a template exists: hasTemplate(file).

Latte function: last.description: Latte function: Returns the last item or character: last(value).

Latte function: odd.description: Latte function: Checks if a number is odd: odd(value).

Latte function: slice.description: Latte function: Extracts a slice of an array or string: slice(value, start, length).

Latte filter: batch.description: Latte filter: Splits values into rows: |batch:length,item.

Latte filter: breakLines.description: Latte filter: Inserts HTML line breaks before newlines: |breakLines.

Latte filter: clamp.description: Latte filter: Clamps a value between min and max: |clamp:min,max.

Latte filter: column.description: Latte filter: Extracts a column from arrays or objects: |column:key.

Latte filter: commas.description: Latte filter: Joins values with commas: |commas.

Latte filter: limit.description: Latte filter: Limits an array, string, or iterator length: |limit:length.

Latte filter: dataStream.description: Latte filter: Converts data to a data URI: |dataStream:mimetype.

Latte filter: explode.description: Latte filter: Splits text into an array: |explode:delimiter.

Latte filter: first.description: Latte filter: Returns the first item or character: |first.

Latte filter: group.description: Latte filter: Groups items by a key or callback: |group:by.

Latte filter: last.description: Latte filter: Returns the last item or character: |last.

Latte filter: length.description: Latte filter: Returns the length of a value: |length.

Latte filter: localDate.description: Latte filter: Formats date and time for the locale: |localDate.

Latte filter: padLeft.description: Latte filter: Pads text on the left: |padLeft:length.

Latte filter: padRight.description: Latte filter: Pads text on the right: |padRight:length.

Latte filter: random.description: Latte filter: Returns a random item or character: |random.

Latte filter: replaceRE.description: Latte filter: Replaces text using a regular expression: |replaceRE:pattern,replace.

Latte filter: slice.description: Latte filter: Extracts a slice of an array or string: |slice:start,length.

Latte filter: spaceless.description: Latte filter: Removes whitespace between HTML tags: |spaceless.

Latte filter: split.description: Latte filter: Splits text into an array: |split:delimiter.

Latte filter: stripHtml.description: Latte filter: Removes HTML tags and decodes entities: |stripHtml.

Latte filter: substr.description: Latte filter: Extracts part of a string: |substr:offset,length.

Latte filter: trim.description: Latte filter: Trims characters from text: |trim.

Latte filter: truncate.description: Latte filter: Truncates text preserving whole words: |truncate:length,append.

Latte filter: webalize.description: Latte filter: Converts text to a URL-friendly slug: |webalize.

Latte filter: firstLower.description: Latte filter: Lowercases the first character: |firstLower.

Latte filter: firstUpper.description: Latte filter: Uppercases the first character: |firstUpper.

Latte filter: lower.description: Latte filter: Converts text to lowercase: |lower.

Latte filter: upper.description: Latte filter: Converts text to uppercase: |upper.

Latte filter: ceil.description: Latte filter: Rounds a number up: |ceil:precision.

Latte filter: floor.description: Latte filter: Rounds a number down: |floor:precision.

Latte filter: accept.description: Latte filter: Accepts reviewed smart-attribute behavior during migration: |accept.

Latte filter: toggle.description: Latte filter: Toggles an HTML attribute: |toggle:attribute,condition.

Latte filter: escapeUrl.description: Latte filter: Escapes a value for URL output: |escapeUrl.

Latte filter: noescape.description: Latte filter: Outputs trusted HTML without escaping. Use only for trusted content: |noescape.

Latte filter: query.description: Latte filter: Generates or appends a URL query string: |query.

Latte filter: escapeHtml.description: Latte filter: Escapes HTML explicitly; Latte usually chooses this automatically.

Latte filter: escapeHtmlComment.description: Latte filter: Escapes HTML comments explicitly; Latte usually chooses this automatically.

Latte filter: escapeXml.description: Latte filter: Escapes XML explicitly; Latte usually chooses this automatically.

Latte filter: escapeJs.description: Latte filter: Escapes JavaScript explicitly; Latte usually chooses this automatically.

Latte filter: escapeCss.description: Latte filter: Escapes CSS explicitly; Latte usually chooses this automatically.

Latte filter: escapeICal.description: Latte filter: Escapes iCalendar explicitly; Latte usually chooses this automatically.

Latte filter: checkUrl.description: Latte filter: Sanitizes URL output against dangerous schemes: |checkUrl.

Latte filter: nocheck.description: Latte filter: Disables automatic URL checks for this trusted output: |nocheck.

Latte attribute: n:class.description: Latte attribute: Adds conditional classes with n:class.

Latte attribute: n:attr.description: Latte attribute: Adds dynamic attributes with n:attr.

Latte attribute: n:tag.description: Latte attribute: Changes the rendered HTML element name.

Latte attribute: n:if.description: Latte attribute: Renders an element only when a condition is true.

Latte attribute: n:elseif.description: Latte attribute: Adds an alternate condition branch after n:if.

Latte attribute: n:else.description: Latte attribute: Adds an alternate branch after n:if, n:foreach, or similar.

Latte attribute: n:ifset.description: Latte attribute: Renders an element only when a value is set.

Latte attribute: n:ifcontent.description: Latte attribute: Renders an element only when it has content.

Latte attribute: n:ifchanged.description: Latte attribute: Renders an element only when content changes.

Latte attribute: n:foreach.description: Latte attribute: Repeats an element for each item.

Latte attribute: n:inner-foreach.description: Latte attribute: Repeats only the element contents for each item.

Latte attribute: n:for.description: Latte attribute: Repeats an element with a for loop.

Latte attribute: n:while.description: Latte attribute: Repeats an element while an expression is truthy.

Latte attribute: n:first.description: Latte attribute: Renders an element only on the first loop iteration.

Latte attribute: n:last.description: Latte attribute: Renders an element only on the last loop iteration.

Latte attribute: n:sep.description: Latte attribute: Renders an element only between loop items.

Latte attribute: n:tag-if.description: Latte attribute: Conditionally renders the HTML tag itself.

Latte attribute: n:capture.description: Latte attribute: Captures an element's rendered HTML into a variable.

Latte attribute: n:try.description: Latte attribute: Applies a recoverable try block to an element.

Latte attribute: n:spaceless.description: Latte attribute: Removes unnecessary whitespace inside an element.

Latte attribute: n:syntax.description: Latte attribute: Changes or disables Latte syntax inside an element.

Latte attribute: n:translate.description: Latte attribute: Translates an element's inner content.

Latte attribute: n:href.description: Nette attribute: Creates a presenter link in an href-like attribute.

Nette form attribute: n:name.description: Nette form: Binds an element to a form control name.

Nette asset attribute: n:asset.description: Nette asset: Adds asset attributes to an HTML element.
